options.name: -assertEquivalentMaxDepth
options.description: :   any integer value >= 1 is valid (default value is 50)

options.name: -culture
options.description:
: run tests under the given culture (v3 assemblies only)
: note: when running a v1/v2 assembly, the culture option will be ignored
:   default   - run with default operating system culture
:   invariant - run with the invariant culture
:   (string)  - run with the given culture (i.e., 'en-US')

options.name: -debug
options.description: : launch the debugger to debug the tests

options.name: -diagnostics
options.description: : enable diagnostics messages for all test assemblies

options.name: -explicit
options.description:
: change the way explicit tests are handled
:   on   - run both explicit and non-explicit tests
:   off  - run only non-explicit tests [default]
:   only - run only explicit tests

options.name: -failSkips
options.description: : treat skipped tests as failures

options.name: -failSkips-
options.description: : treat skipped tests as skipped [default]

options.name: -failWarns
options.description: : treat passing tests with warnings as failures

options.name: -failWarns-
options.description: : treat passing tests with warnings as successful [default]

options.name: -ignoreFailures
options.description: : if tests fail, do not return a failure exit code

options.name: -internalDiagnostics
options.description: : enable internal diagnostics messages for all test assemblies

options.name: -list
options.description:
: list information about the test assemblies rather than running tests (implies -noLogo)
: note: you can add '/json' to the end of any option to get the listing in JSON format
:   classes - list class names of every class which contains tests
:   full    - list complete discovery data
:   methods - list class+method names of every method which is a test
:   tests   - list just the display name of all tests
:   traits  - list the set of trait name/value pairs used in the test assemblies

options.name: -longRunning
options.description:
: enable long running (hung) test detection (implies -diagnostics) by specifying
: the number of seconds (as a positive integer) to report a test as running
: too long (most effective with parallelAlgorithm 'conservative')

options.name: -maxThreads
options.description:
: maximum thread count for collection parallelization
:   default   - run with default (1 thread per CPU thread)
:   unlimited - run with unbounded thread count
:   (integer) - use exactly this many threads (e.g., '2' = 2 threads)
:   (float)x  - use a multiple of CPU threads (e.g., '2.0x' = 2.0 * the number of CPU threads)

options.name: -methodDisplay
options.description:
: set default test display name
:   classAndMethod - Use a fully qualified name [default]
:   method         - Use just the method name

options.name: -methodDisplayOptions
options.description:
: alters the default test display name
: note: you can specify more than one flag by joining with commas
:   none                       - apply no alterations [default]
:   all                        - apply all alterations
:   replacePeriodWithComma     - replace periods in names with commas
:   replaceUnderscoreWithSpace - replace underscores in names with spaces
:   useOperatorMonikers        - replace operator names with operators
:                                  'lt' becomes '<'
:                                  'le' becomes '<='
:                                  'eq' becomes '='
:                                  'ne' becomes '!='
:                                  'gt' becomes '>'
:                                  'ge' becomes '>='
:   useEscapeSequences         - replace ASCII and Unicode escape sequences
:                                   X + 2 hex digits (i.e., 'X2C' becomes ',')
:                                   U + 4 hex digits (i.e., 'U0192' becomes 'ƒ')

options.name: -noAutoReporters
options.description:
: do not allow reporters to be auto-enabled by environment
: (for example, auto-detecting TeamCity or AppVeyor)

options.name: -noColor
options.description: : do not output results with colors

options.name: -noLogo
options.description: : do not show the copyright message

options.name: -parallel
options.description:
: set parallelization based on option
:   none        - turn off all parallelization
:   collections - only parallelize collections [default]
:   assemblies  - only parallelize assemblies
:   all         - parallelize assemblies & collections

options.name: -parallelAlgorithm
options.description:
: set the parallelization algoritm
:   conservative - start the minimum number of tests [default]
:   aggressive   - start as many tests as possible
: for more information, see https://xunit.net/docs/running-tests-in-parallel#algorithms

options.name: -pause
options.description: : wait for input before running tests

options.name: -preEnumerateTheories
options.description: : enable theory pre-enumeration (disabled by default)

options.name: -showLiveOutput
options.description: : show output messages from tests live

options.name: -stopOnFail
options.description: : stop on first test failure

options.name: -useAnsiColor
options.description: : force using ANSI color output on Windows (non-Windows always uses ANSI colors)

options.name: -wait
options.description: : wait for input after completion

options.name: -noShadow
options.description: : do not shadow copy assemblies

options.name: -class
options.description: : run all methods in a given test class (type names are fully qualified;

options.name: -class-
options.description: : do not run any methods in a given test class (type names are fully qualified;

options.name: -method
options.description: : run a given test method (including the fully qualified type name;

options.name: -method-
options.description: : do not run a given test method (including the fully qualified type name;

options.name: -namespace
options.description: : run all methods in a given namespace (i.e., 'MyNamespace.MySubNamespace';

options.name: -namespace-
options.description: : do not run any methods in a given namespace (i.e., 'MyNamespace.MySubNamespace';

options.name: -trait
options.description: : only run tests with matching name/value traits (wildcard '*' is supported at the

options.name: -printMaxEnumerableLength
options.description: : override the maximum number of values to show when printing a collection

options.name: -printMaxObjectDepth
options.description: : override the maximum recursive depth when printing object values

options.name: -printMaxStringLength
options.description: : override the maximum length to show when printing a string value

options.name: -result-ctrf
options.description: : output results to CTRF (JSON) file

options.name: -result-html
options.description: : output results to HTML file

options.name: -result-trx
options.description: : output results to TRX (XML) file

options.name: -result-xml
options.description: : output results to xUnit.net v2+ (XML) file
